title: Skyblock Enchantments
description: Enchantments from Hypixel Skyblock in vanilla Minecraft
body:
Adds a bunch of enchantments from Hypixel Skyblock into vanilla Minecraft, including:
- Champion
- Cleave
- Critical
- Cubism
- Dragon Hunter
- Duplex
- Ender Slayer
- Experience
- First Strike
- Flash
- Growth
- Habanero Tactics
- Infinite Quiver
- Legion
- Luck
- No Pain No Gain
- One For All
- Reflection
- Smelting Touch
- Smoldering
- Soul Eater
- Transylvanian
- Looting on bows (Chance replacement)
